title: Exclusive: Oracle Data Centers Face Multibillion-Dollar Cost Surprises
summary: The cloud provider earlier this year was planning to spend billions of dollars to build its own natural-gas plants to power Project Jupiter, a 1,400-acre, two-plus gigawatt AI data center for OpenAI near the Texas border town of El Paso.
